items.name: A.R.C. Commemorative Coin
items.flavor: Celebrates an event that absolutely did not go well.

items.name: A.R.C. Gold Commemorative Coin
items.flavor: Shiny, heavy, and historically inaccurate.

items.name: A.R.C. Platinum Coin
items.flavor: Worth more than your entire loadout.

items.name: Golden Spork
items.flavor: The ultimate hybrid utensil. Revered by collectors.

items.name: Silver Spork
items.flavor: Elegant. Confused. Functional.

items.name: Rusted Spork
items.flavor: A relic of simpler, tetanus-filled times.

items.name: Vintage Comic Book
items.flavor: Features a hero who fights robots. The cover is torn but the nostalgia is intact.

items.name: Vintage Comic Book (First Edition)
items.flavor: The hero dies on page 3. Bold storytelling.

items.name: Vintage Comic Book (Banned Issue)
items.flavor: This issue was recalled for 'emotional damage.'

items.name: Collector Plate (A.R.C. Memorial Edition)
items.flavor: Commemorates an event that is definitely also abandoned now.

items.name: Shattered Collector Plate
items.flavor: Still collectible. Technically.

items.name: Collector Plate (Gold Trim)
items.flavor: The gold is real. The craftsmanship is not.

items.name: A.R.C. Vintage Coin
items.flavor: Worth a lot to collectors. Worth nothing to everyone else.

items.name: Fake A.R.C. Vintage Coin
items.flavor: Looks real from a distance. A great distance.

items.name: A.R.C. Platinum Collector Coin
items.flavor: Stamped with a misprint that makes it priceless.

items.name: Tarnished Ring
items.flavor: Engraving reads: 'We tried.'

items.name: Silver Ring
items.flavor: Fits perfectly. Uncomfortably perfectly.

items.name: Diamond Ring (Real)
items.flavor: You feel richer just holding it.

items.name: Fake Diamond Shard
items.flavor: Shiny. Useless. Still shiny.

items.name: Ruby Fragment
items.flavor: Probably real. Probably.

items.name: Emerald Core Gem
items.flavor: Glows faintly. You pretend not to notice.

items.name: Small Rare Statue
items.flavor: Looks expensive. Feels heavy. Probably cursed.

items.name: Medium Rare Statue
items.flavor: Depicts a hero you've never heard of.

items.name: Large Rare Statue
items.flavor: Too heavy to carry. You carry it anyway.

items.name: Rusted Ancient Coin
items.flavor: Older than A.R.C. Barely.

items.name: Clean Ancient Coin
items.flavor: Mint condition. Literally.

items.name: Ancient Coin (Royal Mint)
items.flavor: Worth more than your entire squad combined.

items.name: Broken Luxury Watch
items.flavor: Stopped at 3:17. A dramatic time.

items.name: Luxury Watch (Working)
items.flavor: Keeps perfect time. Unlike you.

items.name: Luxury Watch (Diamond-Encrusted)
items.flavor: You can hear it ticking. You can feel it judging.

items.name: Small Gold Bar
items.flavor: Heavy for its size. Valuable for its weight.

items.name: Medium Gold Bar
items.flavor: Feels like wealth. Smells like fingerprints.

items.name: Large Gold Bar
items.flavor: You consider retiring. Briefly.

items.name: Unknown Precious Artifact
items.flavor: You have no idea what it is. Valuable though.

items.name: A.R.C. Artifact (Recovered)
items.flavor: Stamped with a serial number and a warning.

items.name: Legendary A.R.C. Artifact
items.flavor: You feel a strange warmth. Probably fine.

items.name: Small Rare Painting
items.flavor: The subject stares at you. You stare back.

items.name: Medium Rare Painting
items.flavor: Signed by someone with a very dramatic signature.

items.name: Large Rare Painting
items.flavor: Too big to carry. You carry it anyway.
